---
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Paper stub template.
#
# Each paper lives in its own GitHub repo; this file is a local
# metadata card that the /papers/ listing reads. Copy this directory
# to papers/<slug>/ (drop the leading underscore) to register a paper.
#
# Required fields: title, author, date, paper_id, type, external.
# Optional: version, doi, categories.
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

title: "Paper title goes here"
author:
  - name: Author Name
    affiliation: Institution
  - name: Second Author
    affiliation: Institution
date: "2026-06-01"

paper_id: "001"            # Zero-padded to 3 digits by the listing
type: "draft"              # draft | dataset | method | short
version: "v1.0"
doi: "10.5281/zenodo.XXXXXXX"

categories:
  - text mining
  - NLP

# URL of the published paper (separate repo on GitHub Pages).
# The listing row links here and opens in a new tab.
external: "https://working-papers-in-critical-search.github.io/paper-001-short-title/"
---

This paper is published at its own site:
[→ Read the paper](https://working-papers-in-critical-search.github.io/paper-001-short-title/)

The canonical version lives in the paper's own repository. This page exists
only so the main journal listing can index the paper's metadata.
